channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DJ Mo Attacked by Thieves in Kenol, Size 8 Thanks Friends for His Rescue
item.description: Kenyan gospel musician-turned-pastor Size 8 has expressed her devastation after her husband, popular DJ Mo, was attacked by thieves while in Kenol. The robbers reportedly used a panga during the assau...

item.title: Seven Tanzanians rescued from Iran return safely home
item.description: Dar es Salaam witnessed an emotional homecoming as seven Tanzanian nationals, who had been stuck in Iran amid escalating regional tensions, arrived safely at Julius Nyerere International Airport (JNIA...

item.title: Estranged couple dispute finances in R1.5m divorce settlement
item.description: The estranged wife of a former Bafana Bafana and Orlando Pirates midfielder has filed a legal application claiming that her ex-husband has not disclosed his full financial details in relation to a pro...

item.title: Rick Morton critiques NACC’s robodebt report and its handling of key figures
item.description: In a sharply worded analysis, journalist and author Rick Morton examines the National Anti-Corruption Commission’s (NACC) report into the robodebt scandal, which controversially cleared former prime m...

item.title: Japanese Telescope Could Detect Neutrinos from Stars That Died Billions of Years Ago
item.description: Astronomers may soon witness a remarkable breakthrough in astrophysics thanks to Japan’s upgraded Super-Kamiokande telescope, buried deep underground. This advanced facility is designed to detect neut...

item.title: Philippine Navy Reports Possible Chinese Rocket Over Palawan Airspace
item.description: The Philippine Navy has reported observing what is believed to be a Chinese rocket passing over the airspace near Palawan. Authorities are currently monitoring the situation closely, although no immed...

item.title: Researchers Develop a Comprehensive Benchmark to Evaluate AI Expertise
item.description: As AI systems increasingly excelled at traditional academic benchmarks, researchers recognized the need for more challenging tests. In response, an international team of nearly 1,000 experts developed...

item.title: DepEd launches career progression program to promote over 100,000 teachers and school heads by 2026
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) announced a major initiative to process over 100,000 promotions for teachers and school heads this year as part of its Expanded Career Progression (ECP) program. Ed...

item.title: Court Orders Nairobi County to Pay Former Official KSh 4.7 Million for Unfair Termination
item.description: A one-year legal dispute between former Nairobi County official Boniface Karimi Nyamu and the county government, led by Governor Johnson Sakaja, has concluded at the Employment and Labour Relations Co...

item.title: Sun TV Network Files Copyright Infringement Suit Against CSK Over Unauthorised Use of Rajinikanth Film Music in Jersey Launch Video
item.description: Sun TV Network Limited has approached the Madras High Court with a copyright infringement suit against Chennai Super Kings (CSK) Limited. The case is related to the unauthorised use of audio tracks, b...

item.title: Microsoft Files Legal Support for Anthropic Against DOD Supply Chain Risk Classification
item.description: Microsoft has filed an amicus brief supporting Anthropic in its lawsuit challenging the U.S. Department of Defense's designation of the AI startup as a supply-chain risk. The brief, submitted to a fed...

item.title: US launches investigation into forced labour practices involving Pakistan and other trading partners
item.description: The United States Trade Representative (USTR) has initiated broad investigations under Section 301 of the Trade Act of 1974 into possible failures by 60 economies, including Pakistan, to effectively e...

item.title: Canada Experiences Significant Drop in Immigration in 2025, Impact Varies by Region and Category
item.description: In 2025, Canada saw a notable decline in immigration, accepting 393,530 new immigrants, 19 per cent fewer than the previous year. This marks the lowest immigration level since 2020, apart from pandemi...

item.title: The EU’s Strategic Shifts Amid Wars in Iran and Ukraine
item.description: The ongoing US-Israel conflict with Iran, alongside Russia’s invasion of Ukraine, has placed the European Union in an unprecedented geopolitical position, compelling it to navigate complex internation...

item.title: Glenwood UIP calls for strengthened library services after Musgrave and Windermere closures
item.description: The Glenwood Urban Improvement Precinct (UIP) in Durban has highlighted the urgent need for better and more modern public library facilities following the closure of the Musgrave and Windermere librar...

item.title: Review: Dynasty – The Murdoch Family Power Struggle on Netflix
item.description: Netflix’s four-part documentary, Dynasty: The Murdochs, delves into Rupert Murdoch’s media empire and the familial power struggles among his children. While often compared to the HBO hit Succession, t...

item.title: Canada Gains Strategic Edge in CUSMA Talks Following U.S.–Iran Crisis
item.description: In an opinion piece for CTV News, political analyst Eric Ham explores how recent tensions between the United States and Iran, driven by former President Donald Trump’s foreign policy missteps, have ha...

item.title: Nehal Hashmi appointed as Sindh Governor, replaces Kamran Tessori
item.description: On Friday, Nehal Hashmi, a senior leader of Pakistan Muslim League-Nawaz (PML-N), officially assumed office as the Governor of Sindh. He replaces Kamran Khan Tessori from MQM-P in this important provi...

item.title: Independent Commission for Infrastructure to Conclude Operations by March 31 after Completing Mandate
item.description: The Independent Commission for Infrastructure (ICI) will cease its operations on March 31, 2026, according to ICI chairperson Andres Reyes Jr. The commission, created by President Marcos through Execu...

item.title: Government launches Economic Stabilisation Fund to manage fiscal shocks from global uncertainties
item.description: On 13th March 2026, Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman informed the Lok Sabha that the government has established an Economic Stabilisation Fund amounting to ₹57,381.84 crore. The fund is intended to...
